message:
test: expand fcp-conformance test coverage from 407 to 656 tests

Add ~249 new tests across 10 files:
- vecgen/mod.rs: +40 (VecGenError, SchemaRegistration, write/serialize,
  core registrations, edge cases)
- vectors/core.rs: +22 (verify error paths, field validation, serde)
- vectors/fcpc.rs: +22 (tampered frames, wrong keys/direction, roundtrip)
- vectors/fcps.rs: +20 (invalid hex, symbol mismatches, header checks)
- vectors/capability.rs: +25 (verify errors, cross-vector consistency,
  claim roundtrips, field validation)
- vectors/signing.rs: +16 (tampered data, structure checks, quorum sort)
- vectors/session.rs: +20 (verify errors, cross-vector consistency,
  key binding, serde roundtrips)
- reqcheck/mod.rs, holder_proof.rs, hpke.rs: +67 (linter additions)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
